description: Every order must have an order_id
Every customer must have a customer_id
Every product must have a product_id
Every order_item must link to a valid order
Every return must link to a valid order
All order item quantities must be positive
All product prices must be non-negative
Return date must be after the original order date
Order status must be one of: completed, cancelled, returned
Order total_amount must match sum of order_items within 1%
